tiers.name: Poly-Si
tiers.description: Polycrystalline Silicon — the affordable industry workhorse.

tiers.name: Mono-Si
tiers.description: Monocrystalline Silicon — higher purity crystal lattice.

tiers.name: CIGS
tiers.description: Copper Indium Gallium Selenide — flexible thin-film absorber.

tiers.name: Perovskite
tiers.description: Perovskite — revolutionary ABX₃ structure with soaring efficiency.

tiers.name: GaAs Multi-Jct
tiers.description: Gallium Arsenide multi-junction — space-grade stacked junctions.

tiers.name: Bare Surface
tiers.description: No coating — high reflection losses from bare silicon.

tiers.name: Basic ARC
tiers.description: Anti-Reflection Coating — single-layer reduces surface reflection.

tiers.name: SiNx Passivation
tiers.description: Silicon Nitride — passivates dangling bonds at the surface.

tiers.name: Al₂O₃ Layer
tiers.description: Aluminium Oxide — excellent rear-side field effect passivation.

tiers.name: Advanced Stack
tiers.description: Multilayer passivation — near-zero surface recombination velocity.

tiers.name: Al-BSF
tiers.description: Aluminium Back Surface Field — full-area rear contact.

tiers.name: PERC
tiers.description: Passivated Emitter and Rear Cell — local point contacts.

tiers.name: Bifacial
tiers.description: Bifacial contacts — harvests albedo reflected from ground.

tiers.name: HJT
tiers.description: Heterojunction Technology — amorphous Si passivation interlayers.

tiers.name: IBC
tiers.description: Interdigitated Back Contact — zero front-side metal shading.
